passes.title: Boston Childrens Museum
passes.benefit_text:
This pass offers a discount of 50% off up to 4 tickets to the Boston Harbor Islands Ferry.
Spectacle Island -           • May 16 - June 15     Thursdays through Sundays           • June 16 - September 1     Seven days a week           • September 4 – 21     Thursdays through Sundays           • September 26 - October 13     Fridays through Sundays Georges Island -           • June 16- September 1     Seven days a week Peddocks Island -           • June 16 - September 1     Seven days a week           • September 4 - October 13     Thursdays through Sundays
source_phrases: This pass offers a discount of 50% off up to 4 tickets to the Boston Harbor Islands Ferry.

Spectacle Island -           • May 16 - June 15     Thursdays through Sundays           • June 16 - September 1     Seven days a week           • September 4 – 21     Thursdays through Sundays           • September 26 - October 13     Fridays through Sundays Georges Island -           • June 16- September 1     Seven days a week Peddocks Island -           • June 16 - September 1     Seven days a week           • September 4 - October 13     Thursdays through Sundays

passes.title: Boston Harbor Island Ferry
passes.benefit_text:
Pass admits up to 6 guests to Davis Farmland at the gate with a savings of $10 OFF per ticket. Dates & rates change with the season.  Visit DavisFarmland.com for up to date info.
Adults MUST be accompanied by at least one child 12 years or younger.
source_phrases: Pass admits up to 6 guests to Davis Farmland at the gate with a savings of $10 OFF per ticket. Dates & rates change with the season.  Visit DavisFarmland.com for up to date info.
Adults MUST be accompanied by at least one child 12 years or younger.

passes.title: Davis Farmland
passes.benefit_text:
Pass admits three (3) people at half price admission ($9.50) per person; any additional visitors must pay the regular admission price ($19.)
Open some Monday holidays.   Summer hours (mid-June - August) open 7 days a week.
source_phrases: Pass admits three (3) people at half price admission ($9.50) per person; any additional visitors must pay the regular admission price ($19.)
Open some Monday holidays.   Summer hours (mid-June - August) open 7 days a week.

passes.title: The Discovery Museums
passes.benefit_text:
This is a SET OF 2 laminated passes, each pass offers discount to ONE person:
Each pass will admit 1 adult at a 50% discount.
This pass will admit children (ages 5-17) for $1.00 admission each.
No discounts on classes, tours, or retail items.
Pick up the pass from the library and bring it with you when you visit.
The Garden is open from April 19, 2026 to October 15, 2026.  Check website ( http://www.nativeplanttrust.org/visit/garden-woods/ ) for exact dates & hours.
source_phrases: This is a SET OF 2 laminated passes, each pass offers discount to ONE person:
Each pass will admit 1 adult at a 50% discount.
This pass will admit children (ages 5-17) for $1.00 admission each.
No discounts on classes, tours, or retail items.
Pick up the pass from the library and bring it with you when you visit.
The Garden is open from April 19, 2026 to October 15, 2026.  Check website ( http://www.nativeplanttrust.org/visit/garden-woods/ ) for exact dates & hours.

passes.title: Garden In The Woods Native Plant Trust
passes.benefit_text: Patrons receive 50% off admission for up to four people (either the Guided Tour Package or Grounds Pass.)
source_phrases: Patrons receive 50% off admission for up to four people (either the Guided Tour Package or Grounds Pass.)

passes.title: The House Of Seven Gables
passes.benefit_text: Pass admits up to four adults at $5 admission per person.  Children under 18 are always free (when reserved as a child ticket).
source_phrases: Pass admits up to four adults at $5 admission per person.  Children under 18 are always free (when reserved as a child ticket).

passes.title: Isabella Stewart Gardner Museum
passes.benefit_text:
Pass admits up to four (4) people at $2 per person (children under 2 are free) to any Mass Audubon wildlife sanctuary.
Hours of operation vary by sanctuary.  Please check https://www.massaudubon.org/places-to-explore/trails before planning a visit.
source_phrases: Pass admits up to four (4) people at $2 per person (children under 2 are free) to any Mass Audubon wildlife sanctuary.
Hours of operation vary by sanctuary.  Please check https://www.massaudubon.org/places-to-explore/trails before planning a visit.

passes.title: Mass Audubon Drumlin Farm
passes.benefit_text: The Parks Pass entitles the bearer to free parking at over 50 facilities in the Massachusetts State Parks System that charge a day-use parking fee.
source_phrases: The Parks Pass entitles the bearer to free parking at over 50 facilities in the Massachusetts State Parks System that charge a day-use parking fee.

passes.title: Massachusetts State Parks Department Of Conservation And Recreation
passes.benefit_text:
The pass admits 2 adults and 4 children (ages 7-17) at $10 each (general admission and special exhibition).  Admission is free for children under 7.
Admission price changing 1/20/2026 : The regular price of adult admission will increase to $30, and the discounted rate with this pass will increase to $15.  Discount admission for children will remain $10.  This change takes effect starting 1/20/2026.
source_phrases: The pass admits 2 adults and 4 children (ages 7-17) at $10 each (general admission and special exhibition).  Admission is free for children under 7.

Admission price changing 1/20/2026 : The regular price of adult admission will increase to $30, and the discounted rate with this pass will increase to $15.  Discount admission for children will remain $10.  This change takes effect starting 1/20/2026.

passes.title: Museum Of Fine Arts
passes.benefit_text: •    This pass will admit up to 4 people at a 50% discount on tickets to the Museum’s Exhibit Halls.  Children under 3 are not included in the count of 4 and are always admitted for free. •    Your Library pass can only be used on the date printed on the pass. •    Please bring your library pass (printed or displayed on a phone) when you visit. •    When you arrive at the Museum, stop at the Box Office to exchange your library pass, and purchase your Exhibit Halls tickets at the discounted rate. If you have any questions or if you would like to reserve your Exhibit Halls passes in advance to avoid waiting in line the day of your visit, please call 617-723-2500.
source_phrases: •    This pass will admit up to 4 people at a 50% discount on tickets to the Museum’s Exhibit Halls.  Children under 3 are not included in the count of 4 and are always admitted for free. •    Your Library pass can only be used on the date printed on the pass. •    Please bring your library pass (printed or displayed on a phone) when you visit. •    When you arrive at the Museum, stop at the Box Office to exchange your library pass, and purchase your Exhibit Halls tickets at the discounted rate. If you have any questions or if you would like to reserve your Exhibit Halls passes in advance to avoid waiting in line the day of your visit, please call 617-723-2500.

passes.title: Museum Of Science
passes.benefit_text:
Pass admits up to 4 people with a 50% discount.  The current admission rates can be found on the New England Aquarium's website .  Children aged 2 and under are always admitted for free.
This pass does not provide any other discounts and cannot be applied to combo tickets. In June, July and August this pass is not available Saturday or Sunday.
source_phrases: Pass admits up to 4 people with a 50% discount.  The current admission rates can be found on the New England Aquarium's website .  Children aged 2 and under are always admitted for free.
This pass does not provide any other discounts and cannot be applied to combo tickets. In June, July and August this pass is not available Saturday or Sunday.

passes.title: New England Aquarium
passes.benefit_text: Pass admits 2 guests at half price off general admission
source_phrases: Pass admits 2 guests at half price off general admission

passes.title: New England Botanic Garden At Tower Hill
passes.benefit_text: Pass admits 2 people free of charge.
source_phrases: Pass admits 2 people free of charge.

passes.title: New England Quilt Museum
passes.benefit_text: Pass allows you to purchase up to two tickets at the reduced rate of $12 each.  The code you'll receive is for one time use only and is not combinable with any other discount.
source_phrases: Pass allows you to purchase up to two tickets at the reduced rate of $12 each.  The code you'll receive is for one time use only and is not combinable with any other discount.

passes.title: Peabody Essex Museum
passes.benefit_text:
This pass allows patrons to purchase a Heritage Pass , Combination Pass , or Plimoth Patuxet Only pass for up to six individuals at the reduced rate of $18 per adult; $12 per child ages 5-17.  Not combinable with any other discount.
Tickets must be purchased in person at the Museum in order to receive the discount.  No online ticket sales.
source_phrases: This pass allows patrons to purchase a Heritage Pass , Combination Pass , or Plimoth Patuxet Only pass for up to six individuals at the reduced rate of $18 per adult; $12 per child ages 5-17.  Not combinable with any other discount.
Tickets must be purchased in person at the Museum in order to receive the discount.  No online ticket sales.

passes.title: The Trustees Of The Reservations
passes.benefit_text: Pass admits up to 5 people to the museum for free.  This pass is valid for the museum only and not for the ship.
source_phrases: Pass admits up to 5 people to the museum for free.  This pass is valid for the museum only and not for the ship.

passes.title: The Uss Constitution Museum
passes.benefit_text:
Pass allows up to 6 people to purchase discounted admission ($9.00/adult and $6.00/child) to the Stone Zoo or the Franklin Park Zoo.
Library passes are good for daytime admission only, and not valid for Boston Lights or ZooLights.
source_phrases: Pass allows up to 6 people to purchase discounted admission ($9.00/adult and $6.00/child) to the Stone Zoo or the Franklin Park Zoo.
Library passes are good for daytime admission only, and not valid for Boston Lights or ZooLights.
